about.headline: Analyst and builder at the intersection of capital markets and technology.
paragraphs: I work on transaction execution, research, and client materials in private markets while grounding my perspective in computer science and economics at NYU. I care about rigorous analysis, clear communication, and teams that move with intention.
Previously interned across wealth management, equity research, and software engineering—from Ottawa to New York—with stops in autonomous monitoring, compliance automation, and listed equity coverage.

education.degree: B.A. Economics and Computer Science; Minors in Business Studies and French
bullets: Activities: Women in Business, Fusion Film Festival Finance, Strategic Venture Society Venturist, Girls Who Code
Coursework: Financial Accounting, Data Structures, Analytical Statistics, Computer Systems Organization

education.degree: B.S.M. Finance and B.S. Computer Science; Minor in French
bullets: Cumulative GPA: 3.7/4.0; Honors: Wall Street Trek, CWRU Dean's Honors
Activities: Ice Hockey, Collaborative Coding Club, Women in Finance (Marketing Officer), Phi Mu, Quantum Computing

experiences.title: Investment Banking Analyst
highlights: Contributed to transaction execution and business development through analysis, research, and client material preparation
Conducted industry and company research on large cap ($100bn+) tech companies for targeted private fund placements
Prepared internal analyses and briefing materials for private capital raises, M&A, and sustainable advisory

experiences.title: Wealth Management Student Intern
highlights: Supported financial planning administration through communication with ~300 clients and assisting with due diligence
Analyzed equities markets and developed models to select investments for ~$100M alternative fund
Programmed Python scripts to automate Excel to PDF conversions for KYC forms in compliance annual updates

experiences.title: Fall Equity Research Analyst
highlights: Researched market trends and provided valuation insights using Bloomberg Terminal and PitchBook
Compiled equity research reports on Darden (NYSE: DRI) and United Rentals (NYSE: URI) for management review

experiences.title: Software Engineering Intern, Autonomous Industrial Monitoring
highlights: Contributed to development of automated warehouse-monitoring drone software and hardware for 300+ facilities
Analyzed 30,000+ AI-powered drone images to identify recognition errors and generated reports for management
Optimized internal storage with Python and Pandas to delete outdated data and automate downloads

leadership.title: Workshop Member
highlights: Selected as one of 12/200 applicants for a workshop on macroeconomics and finance convergence
Created and presented a pitch on Chagee (NASDAQ: CHA) with financial summaries, DCF modeling, and industry outlook

leadership.title: Vice President and Treasurer
highlights: Managed $2.5k budget, coordinated event spending, outreach to 50+ alumni, and liaised with team members
Hosted social, networking, and professional development events for women in computer and data science

leadership.title: Head Coach and Senior Advisor
highlights: Coached players aged 4–11 using 11 years of competitive experience in a community program
Communicated with parents in Mandarin and English; trained and supervised head and assistant coaches
